'''鈭歴-l-sh-sh''' ('''kasalsheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photosensitise|photosensitise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photosensitise|photosensitise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-l-sh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasalsheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisalsheshoko|thisalsheshoko]] || [[word:jisalsheshoko|jisalsheshoko]] || [[word:shisalsheshoko|shisalsheshoko]] || [[word:kisalsheshoko|kisalsheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusalsheshoko|thuthusalsheshoko]] || [[word:jujusalsheshoko|jujusalsheshoko]] || [[word:shushusalsheshoko|shushusalsheshoko]] || [[word:kukusalsheshoko|kukusalsheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusalsheshoko|thusalsheshoko]] || [[word:jusalsheshoko|jusalsheshoko]] || [[word:shusalsheshoko|shusalsheshoko]] || [[word:kusalsheshoko|kusalsheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusalsheshoko|thusalsheshoko]] || [[word:jusalsheshoko|jusalsheshoko]] || [[word:shusalsheshoko|shusalsheshoko]] || [[word:kusalsheshoko|kusalsheshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosalsheshoko|thosalsheshoko]] || [[word:josalsheshoko|josalsheshoko]] || [[word:shosalsheshoko|shosalsheshoko]] || [[word:kosalsheshoko|kosalsheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙salsheshoko|th忙salsheshoko]] || [[word:j忙salsheshoko|j忙salsheshoko]] || [[word:sh忙salsheshoko|sh忙salsheshoko]] || [[word:k忙salsheshoko|k忙salsheshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasalsheshoko|thasalsheshoko]] || [[word:jasalsheshoko|jasalsheshoko]] || [[word:shasalsheshoko|shasalsheshoko]] || [[word:kasalsheshoko|kasalsheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasalsheshoko|thasalsheshoko]] || [[word:jasalsheshoko|jasalsheshoko]] || [[word:shasalsheshoko|shasalsheshoko]] || [[word:kasalsheshoko|kasalsheshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
